properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 56/21

 VESTERAALEN. ANDOYA WEST
 1. ANDOYA SPACE WILL CONDUCT LAUNCH OPERATIONS IN THE PERIOD 26-27MAI 21. TIME 16:00 - 22:00UTC
  
 2. MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING DANGER AREA: 
 A. 69-01.50N  015-29.40E
 B. 69-03.30N  014-32.00E
 C. 69-29.00N  014-32.00E
 D. 69-29.00N  015-45.30E
 E. 69-11.40N  015-49.40E
 F. 69-01.50N  015-29.40E
  
 3. DURING THE ABOVE-MENTIONED PERIODE, MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO AVOID NOTIFIED DANGER AREA, OR TO CONTACT ANDOYA SPACE FOR COORDINATION. BY TELEPHONE +47 76 14 45 82 OR +47 905 65 482, OR BY VHF CH. 16 OR 14.
 CHARTS: 78, 81, 311, 312.
